attacking_style: Exploits early breakaway opportunities on mountain stages with steep gradients, capable of converting breakaway positioning into stage wins and GC gains.
team_tactics: Movistar deploys him in opportunistic breakaways on mountain stages, willing to commit to early GC opportunities rather than waiting for team leaders.
terrain_preference: Steep gradient climbs like Picon Blanco; thrives when allowed freedom in breakaways rather than direct GC battles with favorites.
vulnerability: Limited data, but age (34) and opportunistic role suggests vulnerability in sustained multi-week GC defense against dedicated climbers.
key_patterns: Succeeds from breakaway positioning rather than direct attacks from peloton on mountain stages.
Demonstrates unexpected climbing form on steep gradients despite age and non-GC leadership status.
Movistar uses him for opportunistic GC positioning when early race opportunities present themselves.
form_trajectory: positive: Showed unexpected climbing form at age 34, winning stage and taking race lead at 2021 Vuelta
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
